svg.text: LLM-Driven Embodied Agent on the Misty II Robot
stream started once; pause / resume per episode
user profile, persisted JSON across sessions
single call; memory + perception in context
no physical parameters in the LLM output
deterministic fast path + generative slow path
target 60 cm; safety floor 45 cm; max 8 steps; clamped velocity
only when complex_task is set (dance, storytelling, performance)
stops on exit 0; retries on failure; 120 s timeout
tracks | arms | head | LED | display | speaker | RGB camera | microphones | bump sensors
episode ends: return to IDLE (round caps, timeouts and step limits guarantee termination)
Example Episode: silent emotional support (visual-only trigger)

text.tspan: System overview (top) and an example episode (bottom). The LLM outputs high-level intent only;

svg.text: physical grounding is handled by deterministic, closed-loop controllers.
